title: cranichis neglecta
intro: Cranichis neglecta, also known as the Neglected Cranichis, is a rare and little-known species of orchid native to the mountainous regions of Central and South America. It has been found to possess medicinal properties, particularly in its ability to treat respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Cranichis neglecta include its potential to alleviate symptoms of colds and flu, improve lung function, and even exhibit antimicrobial properties. Traditionally, this plant is prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures to harness its medicinal properties, although further research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety for human consumption.
